bonuses.leadin: Mary Beth Edelson’s collage Some Living American Women Artists replaces the faces of people in this painting with those of people like Alma Thomas and Helen Frankenthaler. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this painting on which Marisol based a sculpture group that shows her looking at its scene. Renee Cox replaced many of this work’s figures with black men in a photographic montage.
Edelson’s Last Supper replaces Christ with this artist, whose paintings of animal skulls like Ram’s Head, White Hollyhock-Hills were inspired by the New Mexico landscape.
One of the few color photographs in Edelson’s collage is of this photorealist, whose vanitas paintings include Wheel of Fortune and Marilyn.
answers_sanitized: The Last Supper (by Leonardo da Vinci)
